results.rendered_html:
baijika (von bīja)
1〉 adj. vom Samen kommend, zu ihm in Beziehung stehend: enas  M. 2,27 . abhisaṃbandha 5,63 .
— 2〉 m. ein junger Schoss  H. an. 3,101 .  MED. k. 160 .
— 3〉 n.
a〉 Oel von Hyperanthera Moringa (śigru) diess.
— b〉 Ursache diess.
— c〉 die Seele  ŚABDAM. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
baijika a. (kī f.) [bījena nivṛrttaṃ ṭhak]
1 Seminal.
2 Original.
3 Relating to conception.
4 Relating to sexual union.
— kaḥ A sprout, young shoot.
— kaṃ
1 Cause, source, origin.
2 The spiritual cause of existence, soul, spirit.
3 Oil of the śigru plants.
